title: calibrachoa rupestris
intro: Calibrachoa rupestris, also known as the 'Mini Petunia' or 'Sand Twin', is a flowering plant species in the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Calibrachoa rupestris include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and aid in the treatment of wounds. Herbal preparations of Calibrachoa rupestris can be made into infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and valuable plant for natural remedies.
